problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: If Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
